companies.name: SpaceX
companies.reason: SpaceX recently completed the largest IPO in history, raising $75 billion and its stock jumped 20% on its first day of trading.

companies.name: ASML Holding
companies.reason: ASML, a key supplier to the semiconductor industry, has seen its stock hit record highs due to strong demand for its advanced chip-making tools, particularly driven by AI advancements. The company also recently lifted its guidance based on this strong demand.

companies.name: Intel
companies.reason: Intel has unveiled new AI chips designed to compete with Nvidia and AMD, signaling a strong push into the AI market. The company's stock has also hit new highs, driven by the ongoing AI boom and its efforts to scale AI infrastructure.
